claim_bullets.bullet_text: Merchants in Sword World have freedom to travel and trade, often issuing a merchant's pass by the king for public shop rights (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.125-129).

The merchant skill is a general skill that allows adventurers to sell items in shops or on the street, and holders have abilities including Value Check and Negotiation (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.125-129).

source_record_text: Summary of the Merchant Skill rules from Sword World RPG - Complete Edition, section 7.2
